case_title: NATASHA NICHELLE STRICKLAND LOWERY VS. CYNTHIA YATES

docket_entries.description: REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF LOWERY, NATASHA NICHELLE STRICKLAND ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LOWERY, NATASHA NICHELLE STRICKLAND RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT YATES, CYNTHIA $3,259.08 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,259.08 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,259.08 FILED BY LOWERY, NATASHA NICHELLE STRICKLAND AS TO DEFENDANT YATES, CYNTHIA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-10-2019 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
ADDED TO EXHIBIT DESTRUCTION REPORT OF DEC-02-2019
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT YATES, CYNTHIA
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-10-2019 - JUDGMENT.
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED DEC-02-2019 ORDERED DESTROYED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $0.00 - SERVED SEP-25-2019, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT YATES, CYNTHIA

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-10-2019 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-10-2019 BY A. JAMES ROBERTSON II. PLAINTIFF NATASHA NICHELLE STRICKLAND LOWERY IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT CYNTHIA YATES IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF MAKES A REQUEST FOR A BAILIFF TO BE PRESENT AT THE HEARING DUE TO THE STATUS OF A RESTRAINING ORDER AGAINST DEFENDANT. SARGENT LELU, J #1821 SERVES AS THE BAILIFF. DEFENDANT SHOWS THE COURT THE PURSE AND WALLET THAT WAS PURCHASED AND RETURNED TO DEFENDANT. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)
